2603.25699.title: Neural Network Conversion of Machine Learning Pipelines
2603.25699.paper_summary: Transfer learning and knowledge distillation has recently gained a lot of attention in the deep learning community. One transfer approach, the student-teacher learning, has been shown to successfully create ``small'' student neural networks that mimic the performance of a much bigger and more complex ``teacher'' networks. In this paper, we investigate an extension to this approach and transfer from a non-neural-based machine learning pipeline as teacher to a neural network (NN) student, which would allow for joint optimization of the various pipeline components and a single unified inference engine for multiple ML tasks. In particular, we explore replacing the random forest classifier by transfer learning to a student NN. We experimented with various NN topologies on 100 OpenML tasks in which random forest has been one of the best solutions. Our results show that for the majority of the tasks, the student NN can indeed mimic the teacher if one can select the right NN hyper-parameters. We also investigated the use of random forest for selecting the right NN hyper-parameters.
2603.25699.paper_summary_zh: 轉移學習和知識蒸餾最近在深度學習社群中獲得了很多關注。<lb/>一種轉移方法，即學生-教師學習，已被證明能成功創建“較小”的學生神經網絡，模仿更大且更複雜的“教師”網絡的性能。<lb/>在本文中，我們研究了這種方法的擴展，並從非神經基礎的機器學習管道作為教師轉移到神經網絡（NN）學生，這將允許對各個管道組件進行聯合優化，以及為多個機器學習任務提供單一的統一推理引擎。<lb/>特別是，我們探索了通過轉移學習將隨機森林分類器替換為學生NN。<lb/>我們在100個OpenML任務上對各種NN拓撲進行了實驗，其中隨機森林一直是最佳解決方案之一。<lb/>我們的結果顯示，對於大多數任務，如果能選擇正確的NN超參數，學生NN確實可以模仿教師。<lb/>我們還研究了使用隨機森林來選擇正確的NN超參數。
2603.25699.author: Man-Ling Sung et.al.
2603.25699.authors: Man-Ling Sung, Jan Silovsky, Man-Hung Siu, Herbert Gish, Chinnu Pittapally
